user_story: As a Recruiter, I want to view shortlisted candidates in the In Review stage with all details and Shortlisted interview status, so that I can manage candidates under review
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the In Review screen; When the list loads; Then shortlisted candidates are shown with all documented columns

user_story: As a Recruiter, I want to search in-review candidates by name, so that I can quickly locate a shortlisted candidate
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the In Review screen; When I enter a candidate name and search; Then only matching candidates are listed

user_story: As a Recruiter, I want to schedule mass interviews for shortlisted candidates, so that I can efficiently arrange interviews for multiple candidates at once
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the In Review screen; When I click Schedule Mass Interviews; Then I can schedule interviews for the selected shortlisted candidates

user_story: As a Recruiter, I want to refresh the in-review list, so that I see the latest shortlisted candidates
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the In Review screen; When I click Refresh; Then the list reloads with current records

user_story: As a Recruiter, I want to switch between hiring stage filters such as Interview, On Hold and Offered, so that I can navigate the pipeline
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the In Review screen; When I select a stage filter button; Then the list updates to that stage with its candidate count
